instruction: Set up the development environment for the project at /tmp/analysis_project/ by following the instructions in /tmp/analysis_project/DEVNOTES.md. The notes contain four keys: MaxLineLen, TabSize, CheckUrl, and Author. You must complete all of the following in a single run: (1) Parse DEVNOTES.md and extract all four values. (2) Count the total number of .py files in /tmp/analysis_project/ (recursively). Write ~/Desktop/code_metrics.txt with exactly three lines: 'total_py_files=<count>', 'spec_max_line=<MaxLineLen value>', and 'author=<Author value>'. (3) Apply the settings from DEVNOTES to VS Code User Settings: set editor.tabSize to the TabSize value (4), set editor.rulers to a single-element array with MaxLineLen (95), and enable both editor.trimAutoWhitespace and files.trimTrailingWhitespace. (4) Open the URL in the CheckUrl field (https://pycodestyle.pycqa.org/) in Chrome for reference.

parameters.command:
mkdir -p /tmp/analysis_project && python3 -c "
open('/tmp/analysis_project/DEVNOTES.md','w').write('MaxLineLen=95\nTabSize=4\nCheckUrl=https://pycodestyle.pycqa.org/\nAuthor=Alice\n')
f1=open('/tmp/analysis_project/app.py','w')
[f1.write('# line {}\n'.format(i)) for i in range(1,31)]
f1.close()
f2=open('/tmp/analysis_project/config.py','w')
[f2.write('# line {}\n'.format(i)) for i in range(1,26)]
f2.close()
"
